title: Card Research Summary - 10 Hong Kong Credit Cards
summary: Research notes on reward structures, caps, and conversion rates for 10 Hong Kong credit cards, assessing each against the reward schema.
scope: Standard Chartered Simply Cash Visa Card
Standard Chartered Cathay Mastercard (Standard, Priority Banking, Priority Private)
Hang Seng enJoy Visa Platinum Card
notes: Manifest declared DOC; accepted as authoritative. Content includes a RewardCap TypeScript interface and a proposed monthlySpendingCap field, which carry a secondary SPEC signal the synthesizer may want to treat as a technical constraint.
